title: lastrea intermedia
intro: Lastrea intermedia, also known as the Intermediate Lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lastrea intermedia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
